description: INV-LAYER-001~005 현재 위반 baseline (ARCHITECTURE.md §13.5). 마이그레이션 PR마다 줄어들 예정. Step 4-D: core/{cache_manager,kv_cache,kivi_cache,kv_migrate,eviction,pressure,offload} → pressure/ top-level path rename. V-10/V-12/V-13/V-14/V-15/V-21/V-24/V-28 패턴에 pressure:: 참조 갱신.
